text: AI is increasingly involved in creative fields. You can now see AI-generated art, where a computer creates images based on text descriptions. Similarly, AI can compose music by learning patterns from thousands of songs, or even write poems and short stories. This raises an interesting question: is this true creativity? Human creativity comes from personal experience, emotion, and intention. Machines, on the other hand, follow algorithms and data. While AI can produce impressive and original works, it lacks the conscious experience behind human art. Perhaps the real potential lies in collaboration—using AI as a tool to inspire new ideas, rather than replacing the artist.
